{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord step three
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The third step to [[Underlord]] is using [[soulfire]] to re-forge the body.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“And for the third and final step,” Eithan went on, “you must call upon your soulfire to re-forge your body.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
